name: Jam Shortbread
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Tart cherry or raspberry preserves
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F. Grease a 9x12 inch cake pan.
2. Cream together sugar and butter until smooth.
3. Add the egg and almond extract, beating until the mixture is light and fluffy.
4. Gradually stir in the flour and chopped almonds until a stiff dough forms.
5. Divide the dough into two halves. Wrap one half in plastic wrap and refrigerate.
6. Press the remaining dough into the prepared pan to form an even layer.
7. Spread preserves evenly over the dough, leaving at least 1/4 inch from the sides of the pan.
8. Roll out chilled dough between two sheets of wax paper to a 9x12 inch rectangle.
9. Place this rolled dough onto the pan and press it down gently.
10. Bake until golden brown, approximately 1 hour. Allow to cool on a wire rack before cutting into bars.
11. Store in tightly covered containers at room temperature.
